speakers.Alex: Now at Anthropic as Senior ML Infra Engineer, dating Priya
speakers.Jordan: At Dropbox, new apartment in Richmond, exploring PM career switch

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: update from inside the building

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yesss how's the first week??

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: dude it's so different from Stripe

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: like everyone is genuinely nice?? is that allowed at a tech company

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: lol the bar was underground at Stripe huh

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: haha ok fair

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: my team is 8 people. really tight-knit

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: manager is this woman named Ava. she was at DeepMind before this

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh sick

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: she's great. already asked me what I actually want to work on in my first 1:1

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: that's how it should be honestly

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: right?? Derek would literally never lol
messages.notes: Callback to Stripe manager from Part 1

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: first project is building their model evaluation infrastructure. benchmarks and monitoring

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh that's perfect for you

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah it's exactly what I wanted. I'm just drinking from a firehose rn

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: that's normal tho. remember my first month at Dropbox? I was completely useless
messages.notes: Casual fact: Jordan works at Dropbox

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: haha true true

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: the office is really nice btw. remember I said it was on Mission near Embarcadero?
messages.notes: Callback to office location from Part 1

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: there's this rooftop deck and they do all-team lunches on Wednesdays
messages.notes: Office perks: rooftop deck, Wednesday lunches

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: free food every Wednesday? I'm jealous

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: lol yep. also got a MacBook Pro and a standing desk on day one. Stripe made me wait two weeks for my laptop

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: haha already comparing everything to Stripe

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: obviously. oh btw how's the apartment? heater ever get fixed?

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: YES finally. landlord sent someone last week

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh thank god. only took what like a month?

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: basically lol. but yeah the place is great now honestly. I'm really settling in

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: good you deserve it after that whole search

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: ok gotta run, team standup

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: go crush it 💪

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: ok I need your help with something

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: what's up

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: housewarming party. I'm finally doing it

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: YESSS finally. when

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: thinking Saturday the 25th. two weeks from now

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I'm there

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: ok so I need to figure out food and drinks

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I was thinking like a low-key thing. maybe 15-20 people?

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: that sounds perfect for your place

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah exactly. the living room is actually pretty spacious for a 1br

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: for food I was thinking like a taco bar situation

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: ohhh yes

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: get the tortillas from that place on Clement. Viva something?

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: YES do that. their tortillas are so good

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: ok and then I'll do carnitas, chicken tinga, guac, pico, the works

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: ok I'm getting hungry just thinking about this

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: haha. for drinks I was thinking BYOB plus I'll grab a keg of something local

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: a keg?? who are you lol

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I know I know but it's actually cheaper than buying cases

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh and I want one of those portable fire pit things for the balcony
messages.notes: Party item: fire pit for balcony

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh that's a great call. it's been freezing

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: right? ok who should I invite besides obviously you

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: can I bring Priya?
messages.notes: Decision to bring partner to social event

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: YES please I've been dying to meet her

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: haha perfect. she's so excited too
messages.notes: Emotional: Priya's excitement about friend milestone

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: what about the college crew? Mike, Sarah, Tina?

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh for sure. Mike is in town I think

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: nice. and I'll invite some work people. my coworker Anil is really fun

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: more the merrier

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I also want to get a decent speaker. my bluetooth one is tiny

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh I have a JBL Charge you can borrow. it's loud as hell

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I'll bring it

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh perfect that saves me like $80

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: ok this is happening. I'm actually hyped

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: same 🙌

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: hey you free to chat for a sec

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah what's up

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: so Priya met my parents this weekend

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh wow that's a big step

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah it kind of just happened. they were visiting from Sacramento and we all got dinner

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: how'd it go

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: really well actually. my mom loved her. they bonded over cooking stuff
messages.notes: Family interaction detail: mom + Priya bonded

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: aww that's sweet. my mom would never lol she still asks if I'm eating enough every single call

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: haha classic mom stuff. but yeah my dad kept asking Priya about Figma. classic dad trying to be cool about tech
messages.notes: Casual fact: Alex's dad's tech interest

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: lol that's cute

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah. I think they could tell I'm genuinely happy

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: are you?

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: honestly yeah. like really. it's been what, almost 3 months now?

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: that's awesome dude

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: thanks. I don't wanna jinx it but it's really good

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: you won't jinx it. you guys are great together

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: how's work btw. anything new at Dropbox

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: meh same old. we're doing this big migration thing that's kind of a nightmare

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oof

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah it's fine. at least it's not Derek-level bad lol
messages.notes: Callback to Derek as reference point

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: haha literally nothing is Derek-level bad

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: lol exactly. ok I gotta hop to a meeting

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: same actually. standup in 2

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: later ✌️

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: hey can I ask you something kind of serious

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah of course what's up

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: do you ever think about where you want to be in like 5 years

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: lol what prompted this

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: idk. I've been at Dropbox for 3 years now and I'm not sure I want to do this forever

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh wow ok

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: like the work is fine but it doesn't excite me the way your Anthropic stuff seems to excite you
messages.notes: Emotional: career dissatisfaction expressed through comparison

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I mean that's a real feeling tho. you should take it seriously

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: honestly that's exactly how I felt before I left Stripe. started creeping in around September
messages.notes: Temporal reference to when career doubts started

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: what would you want to do if you could do anything

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: honestly? I've been thinking about product management

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh interesting. why PM specifically

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I feel like I'm always the person on the team thinking about the user. why we're building things not just how

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: that's actually really true. you've always been like that

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I actually took this online PM course from Reforge a few weeks ago. it was really eye-opening

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh nice. are you thinking about actually making the switch?

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: maybe. I've been looking at some associate PM roles. Google has one on the Cloud team that looks really interesting

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: dude you should totally go for it

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: you think? I feel like I'd basically be starting over from scratch

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I mean yeah kind of but that's literally what I just did and it was the best decision I've made in years

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: true. you do seem way happier

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I really am. like night and day from Stripe honestly

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I think you should go for it. life's too short to feel meh about your work

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yeah you're right

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh and Lisa from Anthropic actually told me something similar when I was debating my move. she said it's never too late to pivot
messages.notes: Callback to Lisa from Sessions 2 and 5

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: ok enough about my existential crisis lol. what about you. where do you see yourself in 5 years

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: honestly I want to be leading a team eventually. not just individual contributor work

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh like eng management?

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah or tech lead. something where I get to shape the direction of what we're building

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: Ava actually mentioned there might be a tech lead opportunity on my team in about 6 months

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh wow already?

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah the team is growing fast and she said if I prove myself on the eval project I'd be first in line

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: that's incredible

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah we'll see. no pressure at all lol

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: and long term I'm really drawn to AI safety. I want to work on stuff that actually matters

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I love that

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah. it feels good to be at a place where the mission actually resonates with what I care about

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: ok well this conversation was extremely adult of us

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: haha remember when our biggest problem was which bar to hit on a Friday night

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: hey so the housewarming was incredible btw. did I tell you that

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: haha you told me like 3 times already but I appreciate it every time

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: ok well it was!! Priya loved it too

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: aw good. I really liked her btw. you guys are adorable together

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: thanks!! means a lot. she said the same thing about you actually

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I'm very likeable 💅

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: lol humble too

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: hey so random question. are you doing anything Presidents Day weekend? Feb 14-17
messages.notes: Temporal reference + date range for trip

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh good question. I don't think so why

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: Priya and I were talking about doing a road trip up to Tahoe. you should totally come

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh that sounds amazing actually

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah she's never been to Tahoe and I haven't gone since college honestly
messages.notes: Casual temporal fact about last visit

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: wait it'll be Valentine's Day tho. you don't want like couple time?

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: haha we talked about it. she actually suggested inviting people. she wants to do like a group cabin thing

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh that's even better

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah there's this cabin on Airbnb in Truckee that sleeps 8. like $400 a night split between everyone

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh that's super reasonable

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: right? I was thinking you, me, Priya, Mike, Sarah, maybe your coworker Anil?

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh Anil would be so down. that dude lives for snowboarding

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: perfect. I'll send out a group text this week

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: sick. I'm excited

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: same. ok other topic. did you end up applying to that Google PM thing?

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I did!! submitted last Thursday actually

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh nice!! how do you feel about it

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: nervous honestly. the JD was pretty intense but I think I put together a solid application
messages.notes: Emotional: nervous but confident about PM app

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I'm sure you did. when do you think you'll hear back?

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: no idea. Google is notoriously slow lol. could be weeks

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: haha yeah that tracks

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: but yeah I'm cautiously optimistic

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: as you should be. you'd genuinely be a great PM

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: aw ok that was like 5 people now so it's still a good group for a cabin

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh btw I keep meaning to ask. have you finished Severance yet?

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: YES oh my god. the finale was unreal

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: no spoilers!! I'm still only on like episode 6 somehow
messages.notes: Casual fact: Alex's progress in show

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: haha ok ok lips sealed 🤐

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: hey so how's month one at Anthropic

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: honestly kind of surreal that it's already been a month

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: right? time flies

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: like can you believe everything that happened since November

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: lol the Alex redemption arc
messages.notes: Meta-reference to narrative of prior sessions

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: haha forreal tho

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: three months ago I was miserable at Stripe under Derek

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: you really were. those vent sessions were rough lol

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: and now I'm at Anthropic making way more money doing work I genuinely care about

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: plus you have Priya

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: plus I have Priya 🥺

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: honestly she's been the best part. we're coming up on 3 months and it still feels brand new

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: that's the sweet spot honestly

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah. oh and she actually got promoted at Figma last week. Senior Product Designer now

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: oh nice!! tell her congrats from me

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: will do. ok but what about you tho. any updates on the Google thing?

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: ok SO. I got an email yesterday

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: wait

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: WAIT

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: they want to do a phone screen next Wednesday 😭

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: DUDE

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh man this is really happening for you

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: maybe!! I'm trying not to get too ahead of myself

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: no get excited. you took the Reforge course, you updated your whole portfolio, you've been doing the work
messages.notes: Callback to PM course + preparation arc

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: haha true. ok yeah I'm excited

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: I'm gonna send you the same energy you gave me before my Anthropic loop

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: I appreciate that 🙏

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: oh btw are we still good for Tahoe Presidents Day weekend?

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: yes! I talked to Anil and he's in. so that's you me Priya Anil and Mike?

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: yeah Mike confirmed yesterday. Sarah can't make it, she has a wedding that weekend

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: aw bummer. 5 people is still great for a cabin tho

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: totally. the Truckee cabin sleeps 8 so plenty of room
messages.notes: Callback to cabin details from Session 11

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: perfect. I'm pumped

messages.speaker: Alex
messages.content: same. ok gotta go but seriously good luck Wednesday. you're gonna crush it

messages.speaker: Jordan
messages.content: thanks dude. talk soon ❤️
